Contact

Get in touch.

We like talking about thermal networks, so reach out if you're working on one.

erich@jouler.net LinkedIn →

Context helps

Who we hear from

If you're working through whether a thermal network makes sense for a specific site, community, or utility territory, tell us where you are in that process and what you're trying to figure out.

If you work in policy, project finance, or research touching TENs, we're glad to connect with others in the space.

If you're a journalist or researcher covering the category, we're available to talk on background or on the record.

erich@jouler.net
